events.title: Paul McCartney turns 84
events.blurb: Sir Paul McCartney, legendary co-founder of The Beatles, celebrates his 84th birthday.

angles.name: Macca's Big Day
angles.copy: Happy 84th birthday to the one and only Sir Paul McCartney! What's your favourite tune from the living legend?

events.title: Alison Moyet turns 65
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter Alison Moyet, known for her powerful voice and hits with Yazoo and as a solo artist, celebrates her 65th birthday.

angles.name: Moyet's Milestone
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 65th birthday to the incredible Alison Moyet! Still sounding as good as ever.

events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: Grammy Award-winning singer, songwriter, and producer Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday.

angles.name: Hello, Lionel!
angles.copy: Is it you we're looking for? It is! Happy 77th birthday to the legendary Lionel Richie! What's your top track from him?

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Pop icon Cyndi Lauper, known for her vibrant style and hit songs, celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the unforgettable Cyndi Lauper! Still a true original.

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering George Michael, who would have been 63 today. The iconic singer-songwriter passed away in 2016.

angles.name: Remembering George
angles.copy: Thinking of the incredible George Michael today, who would have been 63. His music continues to inspire and move us.

events.title: 17th Anniversary of Michael Jackson's Death
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the passing of the 'King of Pop', Michael Jackson.

angles.name: King of Pop Remembered
angles.copy: 17 years since we lost the one and only King of Pop, Michael Jackson. His music and legacy continue to thrill generations.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Sir Ringo Starr, drummer for The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Peace and Love
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! Keep on drumming, Sir Ringo.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Rock God's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the incomparable Dr. Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' legendary frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Jagger's Still Rolling
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger! Still strutting, still singing, still a rock and roll icon.

events.title: 45th Anniversary of MTV Launch
events.blurb: MTV launched on this day in 1981, forever changing the music landscape with its first video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: MTV Changed Everything
angles.copy: 45 years ago, MTV launched and changed music forever. What's the first music video you remember seeing?

events.title: 32 Years of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Oasis Debut Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'! A monumental album that defined a generation. What's your favourite track?

events.title: 57 Years Since Woodstock
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival, '3 Days of Peace & Music', began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million gathered for peace and music at Woodstock. What an incredible moment in history!

events.title: 49th Anniversary of Elvis' Death
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: 49 years today since we lost Elvis Presley. His music lives on as powerfully as ever.

events.title: 30th Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Death
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the passing of influential rapper Tupac Shakur in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: 30 years ago today, we lost a hip-hop pioneer. Tupac Shakur's lyrics and legacy continue to resonate deeply.

events.title: 56th Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix.

angles.name: Hendrix's Legacy
angles.copy: 56 years since the world lost Jimi Hendrix, but his revolutionary guitar playing still sounds as fresh and powerful as ever.

events.title: 57 Years of The Beatles' 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous ever!

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Hynde's Big Day
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the brilliant Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman and rock and roll star Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: LG's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock and roll swagger.

events.title: 55 Years of John Lennon's 'Imagine' Album
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic album 'Imagine' on this day in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine The Album
angles.copy: 55 years ago, John Lennon released the timeless 'Imagine' album. What a powerful message that still resonates today.

events.title: 25 Years Since Apple Launched the First iPod
events.blurb: Apple launched the revolutionary first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, changing how we listen to music.

angles.name: The Original iPod
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple launched this game-changer and put '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating 007 and the enduring film franchise.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! What's your favourite Bond theme song, and who's your pick for the next 007?
